Off Calendar Feb-27-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Estate
Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Continued To Feb-27-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng for the Administrator.

Ms. Ng. stated that they opened probate because they could not access the Decedent's assets, that there are $11,000.00 in expenses, that there is $7,000.00 or so left and that there are still some further expenses and costs to the Court. Ms. Ng also stated that she will file an inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution. Status on closing estate is continued February 27, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Wu. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order
